name: my-work-flow-plus
description: **My WorkFlow+** is an ERP web application built on the **Django 5.x (Python 3.12)** framework. It provides  **a streamlined** interface for managing clients, products, services, and sales operations. Beyond core management, the  application delivers **actionable insights** through integrated dashboards and maintains robust audit logs. Its  **modular architecture** ensures a balance between user intuition and enterprise-grade scalability.
